articles.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. When Fox announced its acquisition of Roku earlier this week, executives of both companies wer…

articles.author: https://www.facebook.com/bbcnews
articles.title: US Supreme Court upholds bans on transgender women in female school and college sports
articles.description: It rules that states can ban transgender athletes from competing in women's and girls' sports.
articles.content:
The US Supreme Court has ruled that states can ban transgender women from competing in female school and college sports.
The court considered cases from students in two different states who had chal… [+1596 chars]

articles.title: Taller, faster, older: How top footballers' bodies have changed over 50 years
articles.description: More intense match play and advances in medicine and sports science have transformed the physiology of elite players, experts say.
articles.content: Studies suggest that in the 1970s, players walked, jogged or ran an average of 8.7km per match - and this rose to a peak of 11.4km in the 1990s, but has since dropped. Players in the 2022 World Cup c… [+111 chars]

articles.title: Netflix is turning into YouTube

articles.author: Stevie Bonifield
articles.title: Firefox’s new home page widgets are helping me focus
articles.description: I launched Firefox this morning to find some new blocks on my home page. The widgets that are currently rolling out add sports scores, time zones, a focus timer, and a checklist, which are already some of my favorite new Firefox features in years. I usually h…
articles.content: The browsers new tabs can have a built-in checklist and customizable focus timer. The browsers new tabs can have a built-in checklist and customizable focus tim… [+2282 chars]

articles.title: Facebook’s new AI Mode search gets its info from public posts
articles.description: Your public Facebook posts could help inform AI-generated results in Meta's new AI Mode. When you search on Facebook, the "AI Mode" option will appear alongside the usual search modes like "People" and "Marketplace." It's one of several new AI features Meta i…

articles.author: Jamie Heller
articles.title: I'm not a sports fanatic. But the Knicks' championship was more than a sports story.
articles.description: The New York Knicks won its first championship in 53 years on Saturday. This non-fanatic ruminates on the takeaways for all of us.

A Knicks fan celebrates the team's first championship in 53 years in New York City.David Dee Delgado/Getty Images
